reasoning: The base rate for NUFORC sightings from the African continent is extremely low, as NUFORC is heavily US/Canada-focused. The probability of an event meeting three rare criteria simultaneously—(1) occurring in Africa, (2) being submitted specifically by a pilot, and (3) happening exactly during the single month of June 2025—is practically negligible. While one such anomaly was recorded in January 2025 (in a report seemingly containing geographical inconsistencies like referencing a Canadian military base in Rwanda), this does not establish a trend or significantly raise the base rate for any given future month. Because of this, my estimate is at the lowest permitted bound (0.02).
